narrative:
Fox Twp township has 612 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
